title: Poisoned Potion turns opponent healing into damage

card.rawText: Play this card when your opponent intends to heal their creature. Negate the healing and force their creature to take the healing amount as damage instead.

effect.value: Take healing amount as damage instead

plan.title: Poisoned Potion turns opponent healing into damage
plan.summary: When opponent intends to heal, verify Poisoned Potion negates healing and converts the amount to damage.

notes: Keep Poisoned Potion in player_1 hand as a response to opponent healing.
Play this card when your opponent intends to heal their creature. Negate the healing and force their creature to take the healing amount as damage instead.

steps: Opponent intends to heal their creature.
Verify healing is negated and converted to damage.
manualVerification: Verify against card text: Play this card when your opponent intends to heal their creature. Negate the healing and force their creature to take the healing amount as damage instead.
riskNotes: A red result marks missing or incomplete runtime support for this rules text.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_082_poisoned_potion-082-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
